$comment: Claude Code plugin marketplace catalog. Users register this marketplace with `/plugin marketplace add github:your-org/ai-pipe`, then install plugins via `/plugin install <name>@ai-pipe`.
name: ai-pipe
description: ai-pipe — multi-agent automation pipeline plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: ai-pipe-core
plugins.description: Core multi-agent pipeline: agents, hooks, skills, scripts. Includes PM, backend-eng, architect, QA, reviewer, verifier, project-ops roles plus 5 PreToolUse hooks. Slash commands and shared rules are skills now (Claude Code 2.1 unification).
